content.question:
Finish the following sentence without changing the meaning of the sentence printed before it.
(Requirement: Do not use contractions. Answers are not case-sensitive.)

1. It's weeks since I last went to the countryside.
👉 I haven't
content.answer: been to the countryside for weeks. / been to the countryside for weeks

content.question:
Finish the following sentence without changing the meaning of the sentence printed before it.
(Requirement: Do not use contractions. Answers are not case-sensitive.)

2. Our school has never held a Christmas party before.
👉 It's
content.answer: the first time our school has held a Christmas party. / the first time our school has ever held a Christmas party. / the first time our school has held a Christmas party / the first time our school has ever held a Christmas party

Finish the following sentence without changing the meaning of the sentence printed before it.
(Requirement: Do not use contractions. Answers are not case-sensitive.)

4. When was the planet Pluto discovered?

Finish the following sentence without changing the meaning of the sentence printed before it.

(Requirement: Do not use contractions. Answers are not case-sensitive.)
